headlines.title: US and Iranian Negotiators Close in on Preliminary Peace Deal
headlines.description: After several days of renewed strikes on both sides, the United States and Iran are closing in on a preliminary agreement that extends the ceasefire for 60 days, begins negotiations on Iran’s nuclear program and opens the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket explodes during engine-firing test in Florida
headlines.description: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded during an engine-firing test in Florida, which shook nearby homes in Cape Canaveral and Cocoa Beach. In a brief statement, Blue Origin said it "experienced an anomaly" during the test and “will provide updates” as more is learned.

headlines.title: Vomiting virus is spreading across most of the U.S.
headlines.description: Flu season may be mostly behind us, but levels of norovirus, the nasty, highly contagious stomach bug, are rising, according to wastewater data.

headlines.title: Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Block, Drawing Outrage
headlines.description: A drone crashed into an apartment building in Romania early Friday during a Russian attack on neighboring Ukraine. The incident is sparking a wave of alarm and condemnation from European powers and NATO. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Alarming rise in weight loss drug overdoses
headlines.description: In an investigative report in partnership with KFF Health News, NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports on the growing cases of overdoses involving GLP-1 weight loss drugs.

headlines.title: Teen ‘takeovers’ push cities to take action as experts see echoes of the Covid pandemic
headlines.description: Teenagers behaving badly in groups is hardly a new thing, experts said. But social media has made it easier to rapidly mobilize this generation of teenagers, who may be craving social interaction and looking for an outlet after having spent their formative years isolated during the Covid pandemic.

headlines.title: Student commencement boos are a sign of wider AI woes
headlines.description: As companies race to weave AI into nearly every industry, some college students are responding with open hostility

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: The NBA Finals are a reward for long-suffering Knicks fans — and this broadcaster
headlines.description: ESPN’s Mike Breen will be the play-by-play man for his record-extending 21st straight NBA Finals this year. And for the first time, the New York native will be calling the team he grew up rooting for in the championship round.

headlines.title: Vomiting virus is spreading across most of the U.S.
headlines.description: Flu season may be mostly behind us, but levels of norovirus, the nasty, highly contagious stomach bug, are rising, according to wastewater data.

headlines.title: Drone hits Romania apartment block during Russian attack on neighboring Ukraine
headlines.description: A Russian drone crashed into an apartment building in Romania early Friday, injuring two people and setting the building ablaze, exactly the type of spillover from the war in Ukraine that many in Europe have long feared

headlines.title: Indicted terrorist commander allegedly spoke of wanting to target Ivanka Trump
headlines.description: The commander of a terrorist organization is alleged to have discussed wanting to target Ivanka Trump, President Donald Trump’s oldest daughter, as part of a series of attacks, according to three sources familiar with the matter
